message:
I've been slowly building my family's emergency kit over time, and honestly? It's less stressful than trying to remember everything in a panic. I found this resource that breaks down the basics in a really straightforward way—nothing overwhelming, just practical stuff most of us already have or can grab without much fuss. It's one of those things that feels good to have sorted out, you know?

What's the first item you'd add to your kit if you were starting fresh?
